description: CompositionBlue and white plaid check shorts made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, with a front zipper secured by a button, belt loops, two large front pockets with piped hems, two back pockets with emboridery, optional foldover hems held secure by a buttoned loop, and comes with an extra buttonFittingRegularWash care Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or wring Use mild detergent only Dry in shade Medium iron Perfect for those casual, warm days, these plaid check shorts from jealous 21 are as comfortable as they are stylish. With a buttoned and zippered front, the shorts sit snugly around your waist, while the loops help you either customise the Fit with a belt, or simply sport a stylish one to create your personal fashion statement. But what makes this pair more trendy is the foldover hem, that can be opened up when needed, and folded over and held secure with the buttoned loops for those stylish days. Team this with fashionable tops and lifetsyle footwear for that cool, casual look.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
